<!-- generated by session_final_report for h5bench/20260710_061131 at 2026-07-11 00:22 UTC -->

## Reproducing this session's results

### Baseline (write_v2 / read_v2)
```bash
cd <workspace>/baseline
# write: DIM_1=2097152, INTERLEAVED/INTERLEAVED, 6 timesteps
bash scripts/run_write_rep1.sh   # ... rep2-5
# read: write-then-read two-phase (write_for_read.cfg + read.cfg)
bash scripts/run_read_rep1.sh    # ... rep2-5
```
Each targets 8 nodes / 768 ranks via `flux submit -N8 -n768`, ~575GB output / ~12min for
write, smaller/faster for read. Always check `flux jobs -a | grep -cE ' R | PD | S '` on the
target allocation is 0 before submitting.

### Confirmed-win optimized config (write)
Same `write.cfg`, plus in the wrapper script:
```bash
export MPICH_MPIIO_HINTS="*:romio_cb_write=enable:cb_nodes=16"
export CRAY_CB_NODES_MULTIPLIER=2
lfs setstripe -c 16 -S 4M "<fresh output dir>"
```
Do NOT pass ROMIO hints via `flux run --env` — export them inside the wrapper script instead
(the `--env` flag silently drops them on this system).

### Trace collection + analysis
```bash
# split raw per-rank .pfw.gz into compact chunks
dftracer_split --directory <raw>/repN --output-dir <compact>/repN --app-name <name>_repN
# summarize with dfanalyzer (posix preset)
dfanalyzer trace_path=<compact>/repN analyzer.checkpoint=True \
  analyzer.checkpoint_dir=<ckpt_dir> analyzer/preset=posix view_types='[time_range]'
# compare two runs
dftracer_comparator --baseline <compact_a>/repN --variant <compact_b>/repN
```

### Cleanup
Always clean Lustre app output after a trace is confirmed captured:
```bash
module load mpifileutils/0.12
flux run -n8 <path-to-drm> <output-dir>
```
Never `rm -rf` a Lustre path directly — use `drm` (mpifileutils) for anything under
`/p/lustre*`.
